name: anti-poisoning records each raised flag to pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl for operator review
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"alice","reviewer":"alice"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --all-checks --log pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"flag":"self-approval"' pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p1"' pr-corpus/poison-flags.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
